mapper.select: SELECT ID FROM ${prefix}MIGRATION_MAPPING WHERE TYPE = 'RUNTIME_PROCESS_INSTANCE' ORDER BY ID
SELECT ID FROM ${prefix}MIGRATION_MAPPING WHERE TYPE = '${type}' ORDER BY ID DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT START_DATE FROM ${prefix}MIGRATION_MAPPING WHERE TYPE = '${type}' ORDER BY START_DATE DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${prefix}MIGRATION_MAPPING (ID, `KEY`, START_DATE, TYPE) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{key, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
